title: STELLAR COMMAND
html:
0% complete
STELLAR COMMAND
css: .sc-wrap{position:relative;width:100%;height:100%;overflow:hidden;background:#030509;border-radius:8px;font-family:'IBM Plex Mono','JetBrains Mono',monospace} .sc-cv{position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%} .sc-hub{position:absolute;top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:6px;z-index:5;pointer-events:none} .sc-hub>*{pointer-events:auto} .sc-prog{width:100px;height:100px;position:relative} .sc-prog svg{width:100%;height:100%;transform:rotate(-90deg)} .sc-rbg{fill:none;stroke:rgba(36,51,82,0.2);stroke-width:3} .sc-r1{fill:none;stroke:#4ade80;stroke-width:3;stroke-linecap:round;stroke-dasharray:326.73;stroke-dashoffset:326.73;filter:drop-shadow(0 0 4px rgba(74,222,128,0.3));transition:stroke-dashoffset 0.8s ease} .sc-r2{fill:none;stroke:#fbbf24;stroke-width:3;stroke-linecap:round;stroke-dasharray:270.18;stroke-dashoffset:270.18;filter:drop-shadow(0 0 3px rgba(251,191,36,0.2));transition:stroke-dashoffset 0.8s ease;animation:sc-rpulse 3s ease-in-out infinite} .sc-r3{fill:none;stroke:rgba(71,85,105,0.3);stroke-width:3;stroke-linecap:round;stroke-dasharray:213.63;stroke-dashoffset:213.63;transition:stroke-dashoffset 0.8s ease} @keyframes sc-rpulse{0%,100%{opacity:1}50%{opacity:0.4}} .sc-pdata{position:absolute;inset:0;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center} .sc-pct{font-size:18px;font-weight:700;color:#e2e8f0;letter-spacing:-0.02em} .sc-plbl{font-size:7px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.15em;color:#475569} .sc-pcounts{display:flex;gap:8px;margin-top:3px} .sc-pc{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:3px;font-size:9px;color:#e2e8f0;font-weight:600} .sc-pd{width:3px;height:3px;border-radius:50%} .sc-pd.d{background:#4ade80} .sc-pd.a{background:#fbbf24} .sc-pd.q{background:#475569} .sc-cards{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:4px;width:260px} .sc-card{background:rgba(8,12,20,0.88);backdrop-filter:blur(16px);border:1px solid rgba(36,51,82,0.4);border-radius:6px;display:flex;align-items:stretch;overflow:hidden;transition:border-color 0.2s;animation:sc-cardin 0.3s ease} .sc-card:hover{border-color:rgba(103,232,249,0.2)} @keyframes sc-cardin{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(4px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}} .sc-clane{width:3px;flex-shrink:0;border-radius:0 2px 2px 0;animation:sc-lg 2s ease-in-out infinite} @keyframes sc-lg{0%,100%{opacity:1}50%{opacity:0.3}} .sc-cinfo{flex:1;padding:5px 8px;min-width:0} .sc-ctask{font-size:9px;font-weight:500;color:#e2e8f0;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis} .sc-cmeta{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;margin-top:2px} .sc-cstar{font-size:8px;font-weight:700} .sc-cbadge{font-size:7px;padding:1px 5px;border-radius:8px;font-weight:600;background:rgba(251,191,36,0.1);border:1px solid rgba(251,191,36,0.12);color:#fbbf24} .sc-top{position:absolute;top:10px;left:14px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:2px;z-index:5;pointer-events:none} .sc-lbl{font-size:7px;letter-spacing:0.14em;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.12);text-transform:uppercase} .sc-cname{font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.6);letter-spacing:0.05em;text-shadow:0 0 20px rgba(103,232,249,0.25),0 0 40px rgba(103,232,249,0.08)} .sc-tstats{position:absolute;top:10px;right:14px;display:flex;gap:12px;font-size:9px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.3);z-index:5;pointer-events:none} .sc-tstats span::before{content:'';display:inline-block;width:5px;height:5px;border-radius:50%;margin-right:4px;vertical-align:middle} .sc-sa::before{background:#fbbf24;box-shadow:0 0 4px rgba(251,191,36,0.5)} .sc-si::before{background:#4ade80;box-shadow:0 0 4px rgba(74,222,128,0.4)} .sc-sd::before{background:#475569} .sc-bar{position:absolute;bottom:8px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);display:flex;gap:8px;background:rgba(8,12,20,0.75);backdrop-filter:blur(12px);border:1px solid rgba(36,51,82,0.3);border-radius:8px;padding:5px 12px;z-index:5;font-size:9px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5)} .sc-bar:empty{display:none} .sc-pill{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;white-space:nowrap} .sc-pdot{width:4px;height:4px;border-radius:50%;animation:sc-pp 2s ease-in-out infinite} @keyframes sc-pp{0%,100%{opacity:1}50%{opacity:0.3}} .sc-tip{position:absolute;display:none;background:rgba(5,8,16,0.94);border:1px solid rgba(103,232,249,0.12);border-radius:6px;padding:6px 10px;font-size:10px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.7);pointer-events:none;z-index:10;max-width:220px;backdrop-filter:blur(10px);box-shadow:0 4px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.6)} .sc-tip-phase{font-weight:700;margin-right:4px} .sc-tip-task{color:rgba(255,255,255,0.35);display:block;margin-top:2px;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;max-width:200px}
